_description: Greenfield, single spec, with a prover_conf section in the JSON. The executor should use this as the prover conf overrides (AIComposerContext.prover_conf_overrides), NOT whatever workflow_options.prover_conf might point at. Verify by checking the prover invocation logs: --prover_args should include -smt_timeout 300, and the conf should include a 'packages' entry.
name: Counter
